# Next-Frame.Agency

> AI marketing agency based in Makati, Philippines. We build AI content systems, premium AI video, social media management, and marketing automation for small businesses — turning views into leads and inquiries. A human owns strategy and approves everything; AI handles production volume.

## Services
- [AI Marketing Agency Philippines](https://next-frame.agency/ai-marketing-agency-philippines/): AI content systems, social automation, and reels for Philippine small businesses.
- [AI Real Estate Marketing](https://next-frame.agency/ai-real-estate-marketing/): Turn property listings into Reels, posts, ads, and auto-replies for PH real estate agents.
- [AI Social Media Management Manila](https://next-frame.agency/ai-social-media-management-manila/): Done-for-you social content and inquiry replies for Metro Manila businesses.
- [Logo Design](https://next-frame.agency/logo-design/): Logo and brand identity design.

## Resources
- [Pricing Guide](https://next-frame.agency/pricing/): What social media management and AI marketing cost in the Philippines (2026 guide).
- [AI vs Traditional Agency](https://next-frame.agency/ai-vs-traditional-agency/): Honest 2026 comparison of cost, speed, output, and control for PH small businesses.
- [Free Resources](https://next-frame.agency/free-resources/): Free guides, scripts, and checklists for local-business growth.

## Guides
- [AI Search Is Changing How Filipino Customers Find You](https://next-frame.agency/blog/ai-search-how-customers-find-you/): More Filipinos now ask ChatGPT, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews to find businesses instead of scrolling links. Here is what changed and the concrete steps to get your business named.
- [AI Agents for Small-Business Marketing: What They Are and How to Use Them](https://next-frame.agency/blog/ai-agents-for-your-marketing/): A plain-English guide for Philippine SMBs: what an AI agent really is, five marketing jobs it can handle, the free tools to start with, and how to stay safe.
- [Free and Low-Cost AI Video Tools for Reels in 2026: An Honest Guide](https://next-frame.agency/blog/free-ai-video-tools-for-reels/): An honest 2026 roundup of free and low-cost AI video tools for Reels — Veo 3.1, Runway, Kling, Pika and more — plus a real workflow to turn one photo into a Reel.
- [AI and Free Public Data for Market Research in the Philippines](https://next-frame.agency/blog/ai-market-research-free-data/): A step-by-step guide for Philippine small businesses to research customers, competitors, and demand using Google Trends, PSA OpenSTAT, Meta Business Suite, and free AI tools, all at zero cost.
- [The 2026 AI Marketing Toolkit for Philippine Small Businesses](https://next-frame.agency/blog/ai-toolkit-2026/): A practical, honest guide to the AI tools a Philippine SMB should know across content, video, ads, DMs, SEO, and research — plus a free 7-day start plan.
